brief: Today's news covers AI safety and agent development, geopolitical tensions in the Strait of Hormuz, and health alerts for Cyclospora. Papers explore emotion-aware digital objects, AI research assistants, and human-AI collaboration in creative writing.
news_summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-Red to enhance model security, while US strikes in the Strait of Hormuz and ICE shootings dominate headlines. Health warnings about Cyclospora and wildfires in Ontario also feature.
papers_summary: Research on multimodal emotion descriptors, AI assistants for interdisciplinary science, and creative writing through collaborative gameplay highlights advances in human-computer interaction.

en.brief: Today's news covers AI safety and agent development, geopolitical tensions in the Strait of Hormuz, and health alerts for Cyclospora. Papers explore emotion-aware digital objects, AI research assistants, and human-AI collaboration in creative writing.
en.news_summary: OpenAI introduces GPT-Red to enhance model security, while US strikes in the Strait of Hormuz and ICE shootings dominate headlines. Health warnings about Cyclospora and wildfires in Ontario also feature.
en.papers_summary: Research on multimodal emotion descriptors, AI assistants for interdisciplinary science, and creative writing through collaborative gameplay highlights advances in human-computer interaction.

zh.brief: 今日中國新聞聚焦於經濟增長放緩、間諜案及芬太尼毒梟引渡，同時霸王龍化石創拍賣紀錄。學術方面多項研究探討AI輔助寫作、情感分析與人機協作。
zh.news_summary: 中國經濟第二季增長放緩至4.3%，創2022年底以來新低；地震學家陳友麟因涉朝鮮核試驗研究被以間諜罪拘留近兩年；涉嫌主導中美芬太尼供應鏈的中國毒梟「王哥」張智棟在美受審；霸王龍化石以5010萬美元拍出，創最貴恐龍標本紀錄。
zh.papers_summary: 多篇論文關注AI在跨領域情感描述、圖數據庫可視化、研究助手設計及低資源語言健康錯誤信息檢測中的應用，另有人機協作實驗平台與創意寫作協作遊戲的研究。

todays_image.caption: Both a lighthouse design and building the agent "Shippy" involve constructing a guiding beacon to navigate complex environments.
todays_image.title: Design for a Lighthouse
